claims.name: Position sweep Gemma EndOfTurn best r
claims.statement: A ridge probe on Gemma-3-27B residual-stream activations at the end-of-turn position attains held-out Pearson $r = 0.867$ at its best layer (L32) on the legacy 10k pool with the 4k independent eval run.
claims.derivation: Load manifest; over ridge probes only, find the probe whose final_r is maximal; report final_r rounded to 3dp.

claims.name: Position sweep Gemma EndOfTurn best layer
claims.statement: The best layer for the Gemma-3-27B probe at the end-of-turn position is L32.
claims.derivation: Same manifest; argmax of final_r over ridge probes; report layer.

claims.name: Position sweep Gemma turn-boundary spread
claims.statement: Across the three Gemma-3-27B turn-boundary positions (end-of-turn, role-marker, final prompt token), the best-layer held-out Pearson $r$ spans a range of 0.009 --- the positions are near-identical on this metric.
claims.derivation: For each of the three Gemma turn-boundary position sweep dirs, take argmax-over-layers of final_r among ridge probes; return max - min across the three best values; round to 3dp.
